title: Sikkim declared first State to have paperless judiciary
description: Sikkim was officially declared as the first paperless State judiciary on Friday.The official declaration was made by Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant at a conclave held today at the State's capital, Gangtok."In the past, distance for a litigant was not measured in kilometres but in days of travel, difficult terrain and uncertainty. Today, that reality is changing not only because of infrastructure, but because technology is reshaping access. The digital highway now connects citizens direc
